entity.summary: Composable EVM-native automated-market-maker protocol using modular liquidity pools known as Wells across Ethereum and Arbitrum.
entity.notes: The first-party domain remains reachable and is linked by current protocol registries. Current data reports roughly $3 million in TVL, non-zero 7-day and 30-day DEX volume, and substantial cumulative exchange activity across Arbitrum and Ethereum. HEI therefore classifies Basin Exchange as active despite zero volume in the latest 24-hour window.

evidence.title: Basin Exchange official site
evidence.notes: The current first-party domain remains reachable and is the website linked from the current protocol profile.

evidence.title: Basin Exchange protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Basin as a composable EVM-native AMM using Wells on Arbitrum and Ethereum.

evidence.title: Basin Exchange protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Current TVL plus non-zero 7-day and 30-day DEX volume support an active classification.
